_review_reason: No fixed USD recurring credit. Card's value: Economy Companion Ticket after $30k spend (conditional, excluded), priority boarding (qualitative), no FX fees (passive perk), Avios earning. The Iberia/British Airways siblings have DashPass quarterly $10 — confirm whether Aer Lingus has same. None mentioned in search results.
_excluded: Economy Companion Ticket after $30k annual spend (conditional)
